channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ADANIGREEN] Adani Green Energy operationalizes 292 MW solar project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Adani Green Energy Twenty Six A Limited (AGE26AL), a wholly-owned step-down subsidiary of Adani Green Energy Limited (AGEL), has successfully operationalized a 292 MW solar power project located in Khavda, Gujarat. This new commissioning significantly boosts AGEL's total operational renewable generation capacity to 19,585.8 MW. Additionally, the company's total operational Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) capacity has reached 1,376 MWh. The plant officially commenced power generation from April 23, 2026, following all necessary clearances.

  • AGE26AL operationalized a 292 MW solar project in Khavda, Gujarat.
  • AGEL's total operational renewable capacity now stands at 19,585.8 MW.
  • Operational BESS capacity reached 1,376 MWh with this commissioning.
  • Power generation from the new plant began on April 23, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adani Green Energy Ltd | Category: Project Update

item.title: [NHCFOODS] NHC Foods incorporates wholly-owned subsidiary in UK
item.description:
NHC Foods Ltd has announced the incorporation of NHC INTERNATIONAL UK LIMITED, a wholly-owned subsidiary registered with the Registrar of Companies for England and Wales. The new entity, established on April 20, 2026, is a private company limited by shares with an authorized capital of 1,000 Ordinary Shares of GBP 1 each, fully subscribed in cash by NHC Foods. This subsidiary will operate in the same line of business as the parent company. The strategic objective behind this incorporation is to enhance NHC Foods' business operations across Europe and the global market. As a newly formed entity, it has not yet commenced business operations or generated any turnover. The company anticipates completing the necessary Overseas Direct Investment compliance within approximately 10-15 days.

  • NHC Foods incorporated NHC INTERNATIONAL UK LIMITED as a wholly-owned subsidiary.
  • The new UK subsidiary aims to expand business operations in Europe and globally.
  • It is a private company with an authorized capital of 1,000 GBP 1 shares.
  • The subsidiary will operate in the same business line as the parent company.
  • 100% share capital subscribed in cash, with compliance expected in 10-15 days.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NHC FOODS LTD. | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [MINDSPACE] Mindspace REIT Partners GNFZ for Portfolio-Wide Net-Zero Pathway
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mindspace Business Parks REIT has partnered with Global Network for Zero (GNFZ) to transition its entire ~39 million sq. ft. portfolio to a net-zero certification pathway. This initiative, one of India's largest portfolio-level decarbonisation efforts in commercial real estate, reaffirms Mindspace REIT's commitment to achieve net-zero emissions by 2042. The partnership will develop a comprehensive decarbonisation roadmap covering Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions, moving from building-level to unified portfolio-wide certification. This aligns with global benchmarks, focusing on data-driven decarbonisation, renewable energy adoption, and stronger tenant collaboration. The REIT has already reduced Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 32.2% and increased renewable energy usage to 40.2% as of FY2025.

  • Mindspace REIT partnered with GNFZ for portfolio-wide net-zero certification.
  • Targets net-zero emissions by 2042 for its entire ~39 msf portfolio.
  • Roadmap covers Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions for comprehensive decarbonisation.
  • Reinforces strong ESG performance, building on 32.2% Scope 1&2 reduction.
  • Positions Mindspace REIT as a leader in sustainable real estate globally.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mindspace Business Parks REIT | Category: ESG

item.title: [KRT] KRT's Manager to hold meeting on Apr 27 to consider fundraise
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Knowledge Realty Trust (KRT), through its Manager Knowledge Realty Office Management Services Private Limited (KROMSPL), announced that a meeting of its Borrowing Committee is scheduled for Monday, April 27, 2026. The committee will consider and potentially approve a proposal to raise funds for the Trust. The fundraising could involve the issuance of listed, rated, redeemable non-convertible debentures, commercial papers, or other permissible financial instruments, in one or more transactions or tranches, to eligible investors. This move aims to strengthen the Trust's financial position and support its operational and expansion needs.

  • KRT's Borrowing Committee to meet on April 27, 2026.
  • Meeting to consider raising funds for the Trust.
  • Funds may be raised via NCDs, CPs, or other instruments.
  • The fundraising aims to strengthen the Trust's financial position.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Knowledge Realty Trust | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [OFSS] OFSS Q4 FY26 Net Profit 11,111 Mn; Declares 270/Share Dividend
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. For the quarter ended March 31, 2026, the company reported a net profit of 11,111 million. The board also declared a second interim dividend of 270 per equity share for the financial year 2025-26. The record date for this interim dividend is Thursday, May 7, 2026, and the payment is scheduled on or before Thursday, May 21, 2026. The statutory auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

  • Board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Declared second interim dividend of 270 per equity share for FY2025-26.
  • Record date for the interim dividend is Thursday, May 7, 2026.
  • Dividend payment will be made on or before Thursday, May 21, 2026.
  • Statutory auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORACLE FINANCIAL SERVICES SOFTWARE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [OFSS] OFSS Q4 FY26 Net Profit 11,111 Mn; Declares 270 Interim Dividend
item.description:
Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. For Q4 FY26, the standalone net profit was 11,111 million, with total income at 20,564 million. For the full financial year 2025-26, the standalone net profit stood at 27,746 million, on a total income of 63,967 million. The Board also declared a second interim dividend of 270 per equity share for FY 2025-26. The record date for this dividend is Thursday, May 7, 2026, and it will be paid on or before Thursday, May 21, 2026. The statutory auditors, S R Batliboi & Associates LLP, issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

  • Q4 FY26 standalone net profit reached 11,111 million.
  • FY26 standalone net profit was 27,746 million.
  • Board approved 270 per share second interim dividend.
  • Dividend record date is May 7, 2026, payment by May 21, 2026.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORACLE FINANCIAL SERVICES SOFTWARE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PDSL] PDS Ltd dispatches notices for registered office shift to Haryana
item.description:
PDS Ltd has informed exchanges about dispatching notices to its creditors (as of March 31, 2026) regarding the proposed shifting of its Registered Office from Maharashtra to Haryana. This move is in compliance with the Companies Act, 2013, following a special resolution passed by shareholders via postal ballot on March 14, 2026. The company intends to file an application with the Regional Director, Western Region Directorate I, Mumbai, for confirmation of this alteration to its Memorandum of Association. Creditors are invited to submit any objections, supported by an affidavit, either on the MCA-21 portal or via registered post to the Regional Director, with a copy to the company. The deadline for objections is within 14 days of notice publication/service, but no later than May 10, 2026. PDS Ltd has confirmed that this change will not alter or affect any sums payable to creditors.

  • PDS Ltd initiated the process to shift its registered office.
  • The company's registered office will move from Maharashtra to Haryana.
  • Notices dispatched to creditors for potential objections by May 10, 2026.
  • Shareholders approved the shift via postal ballot on March 14, 2026.
  • The company assures creditors that payable sums will not be affected.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PDS Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [OFSS] OFSS FY26 Revenue up 12% to ₹7,672 Cr; Q4 Net Income up 31%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd (OFSS) announced strong financial results for the fiscal year and quarter ended March 31, 2026. For FY26, consolidated revenue grew 12% to ₹7,672 Crore, with net income increasing 11% to ₹2,639 Crore. The products business revenue rose 12% to ₹6,942 Crore, and services revenue increased 16% to ₹730 Crore. In Q4 FY26, consolidated revenue surged 20% YoY to ₹2,065 Crore, and net income jumped 31% YoY to ₹842 Crore. The Board also declared a second interim dividend of ₹270 per equity share for the financial year 2025-26, highlighting strategic partnerships and cloud offerings with embedded AI.

  • FY26 consolidated revenue grew 12% to ₹7,672 Crore.
  • FY26 net income increased 11% to ₹2,639 Crore.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue rose 20% YoY to ₹2,065 Crore.
  • Q4 FY26 net income jumped 31% YoY to ₹842 Crore.
  • Board declared ₹270 per share second interim dividend.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORACLE FINANCIAL SERVICES SOFTWARE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RELIANCE] RIL: IndiaCast Media (Jiostar WOS) Amalgamates
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Reliance Industries Ltd's subsidiary, Jiostar India Private Limited, announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, IndiaCast Media Distribution Private Limited, has amalgamated with itself. This corporate action became effective on April 21, 2026, as per an order from the Regional Director, Western Region, Ministry of Corporate Affairs. This move is expected to streamline the internal corporate structure within the Reliance group.

  • RIL's wholly-owned subsidiary, IndiaCast Media, has amalgamated.
  • The amalgamation became effective on April 21, 2026.
  • Action was approved by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs.
  • This move likely simplifies the group's corporate structure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [UNIMECH] Unimech Aerospace approves ₹450 Cr investment for Hobel Bellows acquisition
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd (UAML) has approved an investment of up to ₹450 crore to acquire 'Hobel Bellows Co.', a Partnership Firm, through 'Hobel Bellows Private Limited'. UAML will acquire 24% and its wholly-owned subsidiary, Innomech Aerospace Toolings Private Limited, will acquire 76% of the shareholding in Hobel Bellows Private Limited. Hobel Bellows Private Limited will then acquire 99.99% of the partnership interest in Hobel Bellows Co. This strategic acquisition will enable UAML to move up the value chain from machined components to engineered assemblies and gain access to advanced manufacturing technologies. Hobel Bellows Co., which manufactures metallic bellows and flexible tubing assemblies, reported a turnover of ₹123.74 Cr as of March 31, 2026. The consideration will be paid in cash, comprising equity shares, a loan, and Compulsorily Convertible Debentures (CCDs), and the acquisition is expected to be completed within 7 days.

  • Unimech Aerospace to invest ₹450 Cr for Hobel Bellows acquisition.
  • Acquisition includes 24% direct stake, 76% via subsidiary.
  • Hobel Bellows Co. reported ₹123.74 Cr turnover in FY26.
  • Strategic move to expand into engineered assemblies and advanced tech.
  • Consideration paid in cash via equity, loan, and CCDs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Unimech Aerospace and Manufacturing Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
